query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph looking upward at a bright light source in a cloudy sky, with dark tree silhouettes along the lower and right edges of the frame. Wispy cloud formations spread outward from the center against a pale sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph exhibiting analog film artifacts with heavy grain and surface texture throughout the frame. The central light source is subjected to exposure extremes, creating blown-out highlights that radiate through surrounding cloud formations and obscure detail in the brightest areas. Dark silhouettes of trees and branches frame the lower and right edges against the bright, diffused glow.
